findings.description: North Carolina state flag image is missing from the HTML conversion of the title slide.
findings.evidence: PDF page 1 prominently displays the NC state flag (blue vertical stripe with NC seal, red and white horizontal stripes). The HTML rendering shows no flag image at all.

findings.description: Venn/nested ellipse diagram showing the relationship between Water Supply Planning and River Basin Modeling is missing from HTML. Only plain text labels remain.
findings.evidence: PDF page 10 shows a large green ellipse labeled 'Water Supply Planning' containing a smaller orange ellipse labeled 'River Basin Modeling', visually conveying that modeling is a subset of planning. The HTML renders these as two plain-text lines without any diagram.
